name: Avatar
description: Circular user image with initials fallback and status indicator.

api.name: Avatar
api.description: Circular user image with initials fallback and status indicator.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The avatar's content — typically an AvatarImage and a fallback AvatarFallback (initials), rendered inside the shape-clipped inner wrapper.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Avatar size. Supported values: Sm, Md (default), Lg, Xl. Other values fall through to Md.

parameters.name: Shape
parameters.description: Avatar outline. Circle (default) and Square are literal contracts — a Circle avatar stays a circle in every theme. Themed follows the theme radius token instead: it renders identically to Circle at stock radii (the computed radius exceeds half the avatar size, so corners clamp to a full circle) and squares off along with the rest of the UI in sharp themes (--radius: 0) — pick it for sharp-brand designs.

parameters.name: Status
parameters.description: Presence indicator dot rendered at the bottom-end corner. None (default) shows no dot; otherwise a colour-coded dot is drawn with an aria-label from StatusLabel.

parameters.name: StatusLabel
parameters.description: Accessible label for the status dot (e.g. "Online"). Defaults to the AvatarStatus name; override to localize. Exposed as the dot's aria-label so the status isn't conveyed by colour alone (WCAG 1.4.1).

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible name announced for the avatar. When set, the component renders role="img" + aria-label so a screen-reader has something to read. Useful for image-only avatars (no initials in ChildContent) where the user's name is the meaningful AT context.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the outer wrapper (also inherited by the shape-clipped inner wrapper's border/ring styling).

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the outer wrapper.

examples.title: Sizes
examples.code:
<Avatar Size="Lumeo.Size.Sm">
    <AvatarImage Src="..." Alt="Small" />
    <AvatarFallback>SM</AvatarFallback>
</Avatar>
<Avatar Size="Lumeo.Size.Lg">
    <AvatarImage Src="..." Alt="Large" />
    <AvatarFallback>LG</AvatarFallback>
</Avatar>

examples.title: Group
examples.code:
<Flex Class="-space-x-3">
    <Avatar Class="border-2 border-background">
        <AvatarImage Src="..." Alt="User 1" />
        <AvatarFallback>U1</AvatarFallback>
    </Avatar>
    <Avatar Class="border-2 border-background">
        <AvatarFallback>U2</AvatarFallback>
    </Avatar>
    <Avatar Class="border-2 border-background">
        <AvatarFallback>+3</AvatarFallback>
    </Avatar>
</Flex>

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The fallback content, typically the person's initials.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the fallback's root element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the fallback's root element.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The group's members — a sequence of Avatars, which register with the group to compute overlap ordering and the Max cap.

parameters.name: Max
parameters.description: Maximum number of avatars to show before collapsing the rest into a single "+N" overflow chip. 0 (default) shows them all.

parameters.name: Total
parameters.description: Optional explicit total used to compute "+N". Set this when the group represents more people than the avatars actually rendered (e.g. "show 3 of 50"): the chip then reads Total - Max. When left at 0 the overflow is computed from the number of child avatars instead, so a plain group of N children with Max set "just works".

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the group's root element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the group's root element.

records.name: AvatarGroupContext
records.description: Cascaded to child Avatars so the group can cap how many are visible. Tokens at an ordinal index >= Max report IsHidden true and collapse, leaving room for the "+N" chip.

parameters.name: Src
parameters.description: Image URL. A blank or whitespace-only value is treated as an immediate error, skipping the request and showing the sibling AvatarFallback right away.

parameters.name: Alt
parameters.description: Alt text for the ; defaults to an empty string (decorative) when unset.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the .

parameters.name: OnError
parameters.description: Invoked when the image fails to load (browser onerror), after the fallback has been switched in.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the .

events.name: OnError
events.description: Invoked when the image fails to load (browser onerror), after the fallback has been switched in.

slots.description: The avatar's content — typically an AvatarImage and a fallback AvatarFallback (initials), rendered inside the shape-clipped inner wrapper.

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The fallback content, typically the person's initials.

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The group's members — a sequence of Avatars, which register with the group to compute overlap ordering and the Max cap.

mdSummary:
# Avatar

Circular user image with initials fallback and status indicator.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display/Cards & Layout
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/avatar

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Avatar | GroupContext | `AvatarGroup.AvatarGroupContext?` | `` |  |
| Avatar | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The avatar's content — typically an AvatarImage and a fallback AvatarFallback (initials), rendered inside the shape-clipped inner wrapper. |
| Avatar | Size | `Lumeo.Size` | `Lumeo.Size.Md` | Avatar size. Supported values: Sm, Md (default), Lg, Xl. Other values fall through to Md. |
| Avatar | Shape | `AvatarShape` | `AvatarShape.Circle` | Avatar outline. Circle (default) and Square are literal contracts — a Circle avatar stays a circle in every theme. Themed follows the theme radius token instead: it renders identically to Circle at stock radii (the computed radius exceeds half the avatar size, so corners clamp to a full circle) and squares off along with the rest of the UI in sharp themes (--radius: 0) — pick it for sharp-brand designs. |
| Avatar | Status | `AvatarStatus` | `AvatarStatus.None` | Presence indicator dot rendered at the bottom-end corner. None (default) shows no dot; otherwise a colour-coded dot is drawn with an aria-label from StatusLabel. |
| Avatar | StatusLabel | `string?` | `` | Accessible label for the status dot (e.g. "Online"). Defaults to the AvatarStatus name; override to localize. Exposed as the dot's aria-label so the status isn't conveyed by colour alone (WCAG 1.4.1). |
| Avatar | AriaLabel | `string?` | `` | Accessible name announced for the avatar. When set, the component renders role="img" + aria-label so a screen-reader has something to read. Useful for image-only avatars (no initials in ChildContent) where the user's name is the meaningful AT context. |
| Avatar | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the outer wrapper (also inherited by the shape-clipped inner wrapper's border/ring styling). |
| Avatar | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the outer wrapper. |
| AvatarFallback | ImageContext | `Avatar.AvatarImageContext?` | `` |  |
| AvatarFallback | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The fallback content, typically the person's initials. |
| AvatarFallback | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the fallback's root element. |
| AvatarFallback | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the fallback's root element. |
| AvatarGroup | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The group's members — a sequence of Avatars, which register with the group to compute overlap ordering and the Max cap. |
| AvatarGroup | Max | `int` | `0` | Maximum number of avatars to show before collapsing the rest into a single "+N" overflow chip. 0 (default) shows them all. |
| AvatarGroup | Total | `int` | `0` | Optional explicit total used to compute "+N". Set this when the group represents more people than the avatars actually rendered (e.g. "show 3 of 50"): the chip then reads Total - Max. When left at 0 the overflow is computed from the number of child avatars instead, so a plain group of N children with Max set "just works". |
| AvatarGroup | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the group's root element. |
| AvatarGroup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the group's root element. |
| AvatarImage | ImageContext | `Avatar.AvatarImageContext?` | `` |  |
| AvatarImage | Src | `string?` | `` | Image URL. A blank or whitespace-only value is treated as an immediate error, skipping the request and showing the sibling AvatarFallback right away. |
| AvatarImage | Alt | `string?` | `` | Alt text for the \<img\>; defaults to an empty string (decorative) when unset. |
| AvatarImage | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the \<img\>. |
| AvatarImage | OnError | `EventCallback` | `` | Invoked when the image fails to load (browser onerror), after the fallback has been switched in. |
| AvatarImage | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the \<img\>. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Avatar) — The avatar's content — typically an AvatarImage and a fallback AvatarFallback (initials), rendered inside the shape-clipped inner wrapper.
- `ChildContent` (AvatarFallback) — The fallback content, typically the person's initials.
- `ChildContent` (AvatarGroup) — The group's members — a sequence of Avatars, which register with the group to compute overlap ordering and the Max cap.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- `AvatarFallback`, `AvatarGroup`, `AvatarImage`

## Cascading values it expects
- `GroupContext` (`AvatarGroup.AvatarGroupContext?`)
- `ImageContext` (`Avatar.AvatarImageContext?`)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Avatar />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-destructive`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Avatar/Avatar.razor`
- `UI/Avatar/AvatarFallback.razor`
- `UI/Avatar/AvatarGroup.razor`
- `UI/Avatar/AvatarImage.razor`
